tasks.subject: Fix Bug 1: check_stale short-circuits on first stale prereq
tasks.description: Replace any() with full traversal loop in crates/mk-core/src/graph.rs around line 661. Add test with 2 file prereqs where both are independently stale.

tasks.subject: Fix Gap 2: N (NO_EXEC) attribute not enforced in recipe run
tasks.description: In crates/mk-core/src/recipe.rs run(), add check for is_no_exec() after quiet check and before -n/-e/-t checks. Print recipe (unless quiet), return Ok with exit_code 0. Add test.

tasks.subject: Fix Gap 3: Duplicate failed entries in keep_going path
tasks.description: In crates/mk-core/src/sched.rs around line 512, check if rem.remove() actually removed something before pushing to failed.
tasks.activeForm: Fixing duplicate failed entries in keep_going path

tasks.subject: Fix Gap 4: NREP=0 edge case
tasks.description: Add .max(1) when reading NREP from scope in crates/mk-cli/src/main.rs.
